revision: added dark-background lockups with white wordmark; removed cast shadows and transparent wordmark counters; retained white ag inside the icon mark
usage_notes: Use the original navy logo on white or light backgrounds.
Cast shadows outside the logo have been removed.
SVG files are convenience wrappers around embedded raster PNG artwork, not redrawn vector paths.
Use logo-full-dark-transparent.png or logo-wordmark-white-transparent.png on black and dark backgrounds.
logo-full-on-dark.png now uses the white wordmark for proper contrast.
